---
title: "Contact"
toc: false
---

Participation in the Silicon Sample Benchmark is by invitation. If you believe your team should be part of it, or you have questions about the submission process, please get in touch.

Reach us at [janlukas.pfaender@gmail.com](mailto:janlukas.pfaender@gmail.com).

Please also check the [FAQ section](faq.html) on this website.
